productOptionsHtml:
Use this section for ordering rules: style number, price band, minimums, and stated production time from the supplier catalog. Final invoice may reflect decoration, proofs, rush, or freight.

FieldValue
Style #710
List price range$12.20 – $12.20 USD
Minimum quantity1
Stated production time10 days

Quantity pricing (USD)

Price per unit at each order-quantity break (from the live product page).

QuantityPrice (each)
1$12.20 each

Catalog highlights

  • FABRIC: Crafted from a 4.8-ounce, 50% polyester/50% cotton jersey knit, this classic tee offers a soft, breathable feel that's perfect for everyday wear.
  • DESIGN: The contrast color collar and cuffs add a touch of retro flair.
  • SLEEVES: The set-in sleeves ensure a tailored fit that moves with you.
  • Experience the perfect blend of style and comfort with the Augusta Sportswear Ringer T-Shirt.
  • Whether you're dressing up for a casual outing or lounging at home, this ringer T-shirt is a versatile addition to any wardrobe.

Patch options (supplier)

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Ringer T-Shirt. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style 710 on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 10 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 1 units (per catalog line).
